name: agent-handoff-workflow
description: Example declarative extension that uses local metadata, task widgets, properties, and safe Markdown transforms to scaffold agent handoff notes without executable code.

permissions.reason: Reads local task, tag, and frontmatter metadata from Markdown notes already available to Forge.
Writes bounded Markdown cleanup and checklist transforms into the current note when requested.

contributes.label: Agent handoff metadata
contributes.description: Declares existing metadata fields useful for agent runbooks, review queues, and handoff notes.

contributes.label: Task summary
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported task summary sidebar widget for handoff progress.

contributes.label: Properties
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported frontmatter properties sidebar widget for handoff context.

contributes.label: Convert lines to checklist
contributes.description: Declares the supported checklist transform for turning handoff bullets into trackable tasks.

contributes.label: Normalize heading spacing
contributes.description: Declares the supported heading cleanup transform for structured handoff notes.
